Device.CfgRegVal_comment: MAX1363 monitor burst (reg 0x00). ChannelId is an array mapping each logical channel to a hardware A2D input (AINx = ChannelId-1). Script patches the scan/monitor bytes for the first mapped channel; author the burst to scan all mapped channels when monitoring more than one.

Device.NormalMinMax_comment: Written to runtime .../min and .../max by hw-management-bmc-a2d-leakage-config.sh (leakage-handler in-band check: raw*Scale vs min/max).
Device.CfgRegVal_comment: ADS1015 config (reg 0x01): second byte 0x83 = continuous, DR=1600SPS, COMP_QUE=11 (comparator disabled, polling). ChannelId is an array mapping each logical channel to a hardware A2D input (AINx = ChannelId-1); the script programs the per-channel MUX from ChannelId and the kernel ti-ads1015 driver exposes in_voltage<ChannelId-1>_raw. First byte (0xf2) is a placeholder MUX, recomputed per channel. Lo/Hi keys are documentation only while COMP_QUE=11; for ALERT use cfg_lo 0x94.
